findings.evidence: Lines 163-167 prove the result via `h.mono_constants hlam' hlam'_le hLam_le`, while lines 125-128 already give `‖matrixBilinearForm (a x)‖ ≤ Lam`; transitivity with `hLam_le` proves the stated bound without any lower-constant assumptions.
findings.fix: Generalize the signature to take only `(hLam_le : Lam ≤ Lam')` and prove it by `(h.opNorm_matrixBilinearForm_le hx).trans hLam_le`; callers needing `mono_constants` can derive that separately.
findings.issue: `opNorm_matrixBilinearForm_le_of_mono_constants` requires `lam'`, `hlam'`, and `hlam'_le`, but the conclusion only needs increasing the upper constant from `Lam` to `Lam'`.

summary: One new theorem exposes an unnecessarily strong interface: an upper-bound consequence requires weakening the lower ellipticity constant even though the lower data is irrelevant.
